core_principles: Sonic Glass: Interfaces should feel like expensive audio equipment—tactile, precise, and layered.
Nocturnal Focus: Design for the 2 AM studio session. Dark, low-strain, high-contrast only where it matters.
Data as Art: Waveforms and analytics are beautiful. Treat them as hero visuals.
Anti-Slop: No generic gradients. Use grain, noise, and sharp 1px borders.

typography.installation: Add these fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700;800&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600&display=swap

layout_strategies.spacing: Relaxed. Use p-8 or p-12 for section padding. Gap-6 or Gap-8 for grids.

grids.explore_beats: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(100px,auto)]

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-lg hover:shadow-primary/25 transition-all duration-300 font-medium px-8 py-6
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md transition-all px-6 py-6

cards.beat_card: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/5 bg-card/50 hover:bg-card/80 transition-all duration-300 hover:border-primary/50 hover:shadow-xl
cards.glass_panel: rounded-3xl border border-white/5 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl shadow-2xl

inputs.style: bg-black/20 border-white/10 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-xl h-12 text-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons. Use thin strokes (stroke-width={1.5}) for elegance.

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use a subtle SVG noise overlay with opacity-5 pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-[100] mix-blend-overlay
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use subtle colored drop-shadows on active elements (buttons, active playing beat).

specific_page_instructions.global_player: Must be a floating 'Glass Slab' at the bottom (fixed). Not full width, but centered with max-w-5xl, giving it a 'dock' feel. Include a mini waveform visualizer.
specific_page_instructions.explore_page: Use the 'Tetris Grid' pattern. Feature the 'Beat of the Week' in a col-span-2 row-span-2 large card. Standard beats in col-span-1.
specific_page_instructions.producer_dashboard: Use 'Bento Grid' for analytics. Dark cards with bright neon accents for the charts (Recharts).
specific_page_instructions.hero_section: Full screen height. Abstract waveform image as background with heavy black gradient fade at the bottom. Large typographic hierarchy.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use pure black (#000000) for cards. Use #0A0A0A or #121212.
Use 'border-white/5' or 'border-white/10' for all borders. Never solid grey.
All interactive elements must have a data-testid attribute.
Images must have 'object-cover' and rounded corners.
Input fields should have a height of h-12 or h-14 for better touch targets.
Avoid standard scrollbars. Use 'tailwind-scrollbar-hide' or custom thin scrollbars.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is strictly readable on dark backgrounds. Use text-white for primary, text-neutral-400 for secondary.
